headline_panel.headline: True conversions are essentially flat YoY. The big 'GA4 conversions' jump is a measurement artifact — gmb_click, banner_booking_clicks, and giftcard_click are not real conversions.
headline_panel.lede:
Organic sessions Q1 2025 → Q1 2026: 8,879 → 10,448 (+18%) — modest organic growth driven by LD rank tightening. True conversions (session_booked + booking_confirmed + contact_form_submission + contact_form_submit): 139 → 164 (+18%). GA4 reports 1775 organic conversions in Q1 2026 (+1177% YoY) — but ~85% of those are gmb_click (GBP listing tap) and banner_booking_clicks (banner CTA click) which were configured as conversion events in Aug 2025 and shouldn't be treated as bookings.

LD-side: BB tightened rank on all four massage queries Jan 19 → Apr 18 (mean dx +1.21 to +1.46/cell). Float owned at #1 of 20 substantial competitors on 106/106 cells. The owner's perceived plateau lives in on-site CTR + booking conversion clarity, not in the Maps engine. Q2 spend posture: hold budget, redirect targeting, ship at the same volume as today, authority rebuilt around the 2026-05-13 off-page program halt.

callout_strip.label: What 'true conversions' means here
callout_strip.detail: We classify GA4's 10 conversion events into 3 buckets: Booking + lead (session_booked, booking_confirmed, contact_form_submission, contact_form_submit) = real business outcomes · Qualified intent (click_to_dial, click_phone_number, click_to_email) = high-quality intent signals · Engagement (gmb_click, banner_booking_clicks, giftcard_click) = top-funnel taps, NOT conversions. Only the first bucket is reported as the conversion headline.

callout_strip.label: Where the plateau actually lives
callout_strip.detail: Sitewide GSC CTR 0.80% (below par). /about/ 0.04% · /pricing-and-membership/ 0.10% · /upgrades/ 0.00%. Service-page schema thinness (8/8 carry generic DaySpa only) + 326 cannibal queries are the on-site drag — the strategy lever isn't traffic, it's click capture.

callout_strip.label: Untracked headline
callout_strip.detail: DataForSEO Maps SERP at AF pin shows BB #1 for 15 untracked service queries · #2 for 6 more · #3 for 6 more. Lymphatic drainage massage (3,600 UT vol) is the single biggest unlocked surface — gated on Owner Item #7.

trend.headline: GA4 18-month trend · Sessions + true conversions (booking + lead) — engagement signals broken out separately
trend.annotation_text: GA4 property 332738090. The 'conversions' figure GA4 reports across all channels jumped from ~126/mo (Dec 2024–Jul 2025) to ~1169/mo (Aug 2025–May 2026) — but this is a measurement artifact, not a business shift. In Aug 2025, three events were added as conversion events in GA4: gmb_click (a GBP listing tap), banner_booking_clicks (a banner CTA click — not a confirmed booking), and giftcard_click (a giftcard page click). None of these are real business outcomes. The true conversion stack — session_booked + booking_confirmed + contact_form_submission + contact_form_submit — averages 56/mo before Aug 2025 and 62/mo after (1.11× — essentially stable). The chart below plots both: raw GA4 conversions (inflated) and the apples-to-apples 'true conversions' line.
trend.may_extrapolation_note: May 2026 is partial through 2026-05-16 (16 of 31 days). Sessions & conversions shown as-reported by GA4; full-month run-rate not extrapolated on this chart.

Banner CTA click (engagement signal — NOT a conversion)
Giftcard click (engagement signal — NOT a conversion)

measurement_shift.explanation: Aug 2025: three new conversion events were configured in GA4 — gmb_click (a tap on the GBP listing's 'visit website' button), banner_booking_clicks (a click on the booking banner CTA — not a confirmed booking), and giftcard_click (a click on the giftcard page). None of these are real conversions in the business-outcome sense. They're top-of-funnel engagement signals. The 'conversions' line on the GA4 dashboard inflates 6–7× because of this, but the underlying booking + lead funnel is essentially stable: ~56/mo pre-Aug-2025 vs ~62/mo post — a 1.11× factor that reflects real growth, not measurement inflation.
measurement_shift.recommendation: For client reporting, use TRUE conversions (booking + lead) as the headline metric. Track qualified intent (calls + emails) as a secondary funnel. Engagement signals (gmb_click etc) can be useful for top-of-funnel diagnostics but should NOT be reported as conversions to the client.

gsc_trend.headline: GSC clicks + impressions — 365-day sitewide trend (secondary)
gsc_trend.annotation_text: GSC clicks aggregated daily (2025-05 → 2026-05). Sitewide. Position + CTR diagnostics live in the deep-dive mini reports (page-winners-losers).
gsc_trend.may_extrapolation_note: May 2026 is partial through 2026-05-16 (16 of 31 days). Full-month run-rate projection: 3,040 clicks · 437,887 impressions.

ga4_status_panel.headline: GA4 property 332738090 · 10 conversion events categorized · true conversions vs engagement signals separated
ga4_status_panel.detail: 18-month pull complete (Dec 2024 → May 2026 partial). 8 channels surfaced. 10 conversion events firing — categorized into 3 buckets: Booking + lead (4 events: session_booked, booking_confirmed, contact_form_submission, contact_form_submit) · Qualified intent (3 events: click_to_dial, click_phone_number, click_to_email) · Engagement signals (3 events: gmb_click, banner_booking_clicks, giftcard_click — NOT real conversions). True conversions (booking + lead) averaged ~56/mo before Aug 2025 and ~62/mo after — essentially stable (1.11× factor).
ga4_status_panel.implication: The 'GA4 conversions +1,177%' headline you'd get from raw GA4 reporting is a measurement artifact. In Aug 2025, three top-of-funnel engagement events were added as conversion events: gmb_click (tap on the GBP listing), banner_booking_clicks (click on the booking banner — not a confirmed booking), giftcard_click (click on the giftcard page). None represent a real business outcome. The apples-to-apples 'true conversion' funnel — session_booked + booking_confirmed + contact_form_submission — moved from 139 (Q1 2025) → 164 (Q1 2026) = +18%, matching the +18% sessions YoY closely — consistent with the rank tightening in LD. Sessions = cleanest YoY signal. True conversions = cleanest booking-volume signal. Engagement events = diagnostic only; do not report as conversions to client.

root_causes.title: Trigger-point page scope mismatch + duplicate canonical
root_causes.body: /trigger-point-therapy/ references medical injections + dry needling (owner-flagged 2026-05-15). SP-01 rewrites body content (same H1, same URL); CN-01 small-level 301s the duplicate to /modalities-techniques/trigger-point-therapy/ canonical (745 inbound links).

root_causes.title: Sitewide NAP + schema thinness + cupping 404
root_causes.body: 372/372 pages use chat phone (855); only 1 has GBP primary (734). Every page carries generic DaySpa schema only — no Service / FAQPage / LocalBusiness anywhere. /cupping-massage/ returns 404 while 10+ cupping blog posts link to it. HP-01 + TPL-01 (M1) + SP-02/03 schema rollout (M2-M3) close the structural gap.

root_causes.title: Off-page playbook rebuild (post-2026-05-13 program halt) — NEW IN v3
root_causes.body: BB's DA 20 → 28 lift over engagement was partly driven by the SEO Neo stack (DAS / Blast / RD100 / NAP-overlay / AI Articles / Driving Directions / Cloud Page / Link Revolver / BatchGeo / ATB / GMB Pin Creation) — halted across HQDM's book of business 2026-05-13. Forward authority: manual citations (AMTA / ABMP / Utah MTA / Utah County + Pleasant Grove Chambers), 1 monthly digital-PR pitch, 1 monthly partner-outreach touch, on-site link equity. REP-01 M1 W2 runs a DataForSEO Backlinks scan to decide disavow.

root_causes.title: 326 GSC cannibal queries · 130-URL cohort needs targeted fill + small-redirect (never bulk NOINDEX)
root_causes.body: The sitemap holds 90 templated suburb URLs + 40 off-topic geo pages. Per-URL decisions in Cannibal_Cleanup_Plan.xlsx: 3 LEAVE / 9 REFRESH / 1 REFRESH-TO-REAL / 19 REPURPOSE / 84 small-level 301-to-MAIN / 14 REVIEW. Production at scale CONTINUES at full volume (6 location + 10 blogs + 3 geo / mo).

root_causes.title: Pleasant Grove cells open + BB ranks #1-#3 for 27 untracked service queries at AF pin
root_causes.body: 3 PG winners collapsed in the same window (Paradise -143, MassageLuXe -138, owner's sibling Paul and Tasha -188). 5 new PG entrants filled the space. DataForSEO Maps SERP at AF pin shows BB #1 for 15 untracked queries · #2 for 6 · #3 for 6 — lymphatic drainage massage (3,600 UT vol) is the single biggest unlocked surface, gated on Owner Item #7.

root_causes.title: Float moat held + near-me growth tightening + 4.9★ × 402
root_causes.body: Float queries held at 106/106 saturation. On near-me queries BB is #2 and #3 of substantial competitive sets. Top-3 cells on 'massage therapist near me' 27 → 37 (+10). Marginal lift is now post cadence + matrix-fill builds + Q-format LLM articles + service-page schema.

hero.tagline_main: Q2 2026 update - what's working, what's next
hero.tagline_sub: Single-pin massage & float studio - American Fork, UT - 4.9-star x 406 reviews

headline.lede: Where Body Balance stands as of May 2026: organic visitors and organic leads are both up +18% year-over-year (Q1 2025 -> Q1 2026 - the cleanest, uninflated comparison we can run). The biggest Maps mover was 'massage therapy' - top-3 cells jumped from 14 to 22 (+8) Jan 19 -> Apr 18, with avg rank also improving from 9.87 to 8.64. The float side of the business is at #1 across the entire local Maps grid and the AF pin holds top-3 in 100% of cells for 'massage american fork'. The room-for-growth picture: generic 'massage' and 'massage therapist' searches saw a few cells slip in the contested Pleasant Grove edge (Pleasant Grove competitors pushing) and the site's overall CTR sits below par at 0.80% - both are direct targets for the next 90 days.

movement_tiles.sub: Q1 2025 -> Q1 2026 - booking + form + call/email intent

movement_tiles.label: Float Maps Position

quarterly_snapshot.context: Baseline period. Modest organic growth tied to LD rank tightening.
Sessions +18% YoY, leads +18% YoY at same lead capture rate.

timeline.title: Steady organic foundation
timeline.body: Going into 2026, organic sessions averaged ~3,500/mo with a lead capture rate of ~1.57%. Strong on Maps (single AF pin, 4.9-star x 406 reviews holding through the period), float dominance preserved at #1 across 100% of grid cells, but generic 'massage' queries plateauing as Pleasant Grove + Lehi competitors push into the closer-suburb cells.

timeline.title: Sessions +18% YoY - leads +18% YoY
timeline.body: Q1 2025 -> Q1 2026: organic sessions 8,879 -> 10,448 and organic leads 139 -> 164. Lead capture rate held at 1.57% - visitors are converting at the same rate, with more of them. This is the cleanest YoY signal we can run: it strips out the Aug 2025 GA4 engagement-event reconfiguration that would otherwise inflate the raw 'conversion' figure ~6x.

timeline.title: Big top-3 cell wins on massage therapy + subscription
timeline.body: Massage therapy top-3 cells 14 -> 22 (+8) Jan 19 -> Apr 18, avg rank 9.87 -> 8.64 across 89 apples-to-apples cells. Massage subscription top-3 cells 6 -> 11 (+5) Feb 23 -> Apr 18. Deep tissue near me +3. Float queries at #1 saturation across the local market. Generic 'massage' and 'massage therapist' saw a few cells slip in the contested Pleasant Grove edge - that's where the next 90 days focus.

timeline.title: Off-page program halted across the HQDM book of business
timeline.body: Authority strategy pivoted from automated stack (SEO Neo / Aaron Gruenke) to manual + earned channels (AMTA / ABMP / Utah MTA citations, monthly digital-PR pitch, monthly partner-outreach touch). Deliberate course correction - short-term it slows backlink velocity; medium-term it removes algorithmic risk and builds defensible local authority.

trend_chart.partial_note: Chart ends at April 2026 (latest fully reconciled month). May 2026 is excluded because three duplicate conversion events started attributing as separate conversions on May 1, inflating the raw May organic leads number ~2x. Owner Ask #5 surfaces the GA4 cleanup; we'll bring May back into the chart once the duplicates are removed.

old_setup.title: OLD setup (Dec 2024 - Jul 2025)
old_setup.description: 4 events, 4 distinct business actions: a booking-flow start, a form submission, a phone-link click, an email-link click. Lead capture rate ran ~1.5-2.5% of organic sessions - the normal range for a single-pin local-service business.

aug_2025_change.title: What changed Aug 2025
aug_2025_change.description: 3 engagement events were added as conversion events in GA4. These are top-funnel taps - a tap on the GBP listing button, a click on the booking banner CTA, a click on the gift-card page. None of them represent a booking. After this change the raw GA4 'conversions' line runs ~6x higher than the actual booking + lead funnel. We exclude all 3 from every number we report.

may_2026_change.title: What changed May 2026
may_2026_change.description: 3 duplicate event names started attributing as separate conversions on May 1. The raw event counts are identical to their primary-name pairs going back to Sep/Oct 2025 (e.g. booking_confirmed fires every time session_booked fires - they're the same business action firing under two different tags). After May 1 the all-channel reported lead count runs ~50% high. We de-duplicate these out of every reported number. Owner Ask #5 surfaces the cleanup work.

what_we_report.title: What we report
what_we_report.description: The same 4 events as the OLD setup. Engagement excluded. Duplicates excluded. This is the conservative, defensible number that matches the actual booking + form + intent funnel.

search_cards.commentary: Top-3 cells expanded from 14 to 22 (+8) across 84 apples-to-apples cells, Jan 19, 2026 to Apr 18, 2026. Avg rank also tightened from 9.87 to 8.64. Action: re-add to the May+ LD cadence so we have continuous tracking, then push via Service + FAQ schema on /massage-therapy/.

search_cards.verdict: Steady gain across the full window
search_cards.commentary: Top-3 cells 25 -> 36 (+11), avg rank 7.34 -> 5.90 across 89 apples-to-apples cells, Jan 19, 2026 to Apr 18, 2026 (longest scan window). BB sits at #2 of substantial competitors in the Pleasant Grove + Lehi corridor - Total Muscle Therapy PG is the only one above. Action: M3 KPI target is top-3 cells >= 35.
Top-3 cells 25 -> 26 (+1) across 92 cells, Feb 23, 2026 to Apr 18, 2026. Deep-tissue is a primary booking modality. Action: deep-tissue service page gets Service + FAQ schema in M2.

Top-3 cells 93 -> 89 at near-saturation (89/106 in top-3, avg rank 1.68), Jan 19, 2026 to Apr 18, 2026. No headroom up from 1.5 - defense posture only. Action: hold GBP photo cadence, monitor Purify Wellness for any aggressive moves.

leaderboard.name: Body Balance (you)
leaderboard.note: Top-3 spots across all 9 tracked Maps queries combined.

leaderboard.name: Purify Wellness Center
leaderboard.note: Closest FLOAT challenger. Only competes on float queries - strong rank (~3-4) but BB's review moat holds the #1.

leaderboard.name: True REST Float Spa
leaderboard.note: National float-only chain. Only competes on the 3 float queries; cell rank 4-7 - BB's #1 vs True REST is the moat for float.

leaderboard.name: Relaxing Remedy
leaderboard.note: The closest AF-area massage competitor. Strong on the basic-commercial queries - head-to-head where the closest-suburb cells get won/lost.

leaderboard.name: MassageLuXe Pleasant Grove
leaderboard.note: National massage-membership chain entrant in PG. Watch on 'massage subscription' specifically.

leaderboard.name: Calming Touch Massage LLC
leaderboard.note: Lehi-area challenger with the highest review count of any Lehi competitor. Strong on 'massage therapist near me' in Lehi cells.

leaderboard.name: Total Muscle Therapy: Massage Pleasant Grove
leaderboard.note: Active SEO/GBP work - worth watching closely.

leaderboard.name: Natural Healing and Massage, American Fork

priorities_90d.title: Defend the #1 American Fork pin + the float moat
priorities_90d.body: BB is #1 in the immediate AF pin across float AND on 'massage american fork' at saturation (100% of cells, avg rank 1.85). The review moat (4.9-star x 406, +4 since Feb) holds the local pack. What we'll do: 4 GBP Posts/mo (up from 3), 8 geotagged photos/mo, lock in the review-acquisition workflow, Q&A seeding for the top massage + float questions. Goal: hold #1 + cross 450 reviews by M3.

priorities_90d.title: Capitalize on the subscription + massage-therapy breakthroughs
priorities_90d.body: Two queries gained +8 top-3 cells across our scans: 'massage subscription' (Feb -> May, top-3 6 -> 14) and 'massage therapy' (Jan -> Apr, top-3 14 -> 22). Subscription is recurring revenue; massage therapy is high-volume commercial. What we'll do: dedicated /massage-subscription-american-fork/ page (membership-tier comparison, FAQ, schema), refresh the /massage-therapy/ page with Service + FAQPage schema, surface both via 2 GBP Posts/mo, add a blog cluster on 'is a massage membership worth it'. Direct subscription competitors: MassageLuXe PG + Hand & Stone - BB's local + 4.9-star is the edge.

priorities_90d.title: Fix the on-site click capture - the actual plateau lever
priorities_90d.body: Sitewide GSC CTR is 0.80% (vs ~1.5% par for local services). Three pages illustrate the problem: /about/ 0.04% CTR, /pricing-and-membership/ 0.10%, /upgrades/ 0.00%. What we'll do: meta + title refresh on the top 22 bleeding-CTR URLs (Lever H), Service + FAQ schema on all 8 priority service pages (Lever F - currently 0/8 have it), sitewide NAP find-replace (372/372 pages use the chat phone), 84-URL cannibal cleanup batch (Lever B).

priorities_90d.title: Unlock the 27 untracked services where BB ranks #1-#3
priorities_90d.body: DataForSEO Maps SERPs show BB already ranking #1-#3 at the AF pin for 27 service queries we don't currently track - without dedicated landing pages for most. The headline: lymphatic drainage massage (3,600 UT search volume) where BB ranks #1 with zero on-site page. What we'll do: 6 new location-pages/mo at matrix gaps (Cedar Hills x deep tissue, PG x cupping, Lehi x Swedish - Lever C+D+E), /myofascial-release/ + /lymphatic-drainage-massage/ page builds (Lever G - lymphatic gated on Owner Ask #4). Goal: 12+ service x city matrix cells covered by M3 (baseline 3-5).

priorities_90d.title: Rebuild off-page authority - manual + earned, post-halt
priorities_90d.body: On 2026-05-13 the automated off-page stack (SEO Neo / Aaron Gruenke) was halted across the HQDM book of business - it was working, but with rising algorithmic risk. What we'll do: 2 manual citations/mo (AMTA + ABMP + Utah MTA + Utah County + Pleasant Grove Chambers, mom blogs, regional wellness directories), 1 digital-PR pitch/mo (postpartum massage angle M2 -> athlete recovery angle M3), 1 partner-outreach touch/mo (yoga + chiro + doula + run-club cross-link partnerships). Backlink audit + disavow if needed.

owner_asks_client.label: Trigger-point page rewrite sign-off
owner_asks_client.body: Paul flagged the /trigger-point-therapy/ page as referencing medical injections + dry needling - neither of which BB performs. We've drafted a rewrite focused on the soft-tissue trigger-point modality BB actually does. Need 15 min on a call to walk through the draft and confirm language before publish.

owner_asks_client.label: Sitewide phone number canonical
owner_asks_client.body: Every page on bbmassageandfloat.com (372/372) currently shows the live-chat phone (855-XXX-5834). The GBP primary is the local 734-XXX-9798. This breaks NAP consistency and likely sends a soft 'multiple businesses' signal. Confirming: switch sitewide to the local 734 number, or keep the chat-routing 855 + add a 'call directly' secondary? (Recommendation: switch to local.)

owner_asks_client.label: Is cupping still on the menu?
owner_asks_client.body: There's a /cupping-massage/ URL returning 404 alongside a live /modalities-techniques/cupping/ canonical. Either small-301 the dead URL or rebuild it if cupping is back. Quick yes/no - does BB still offer cupping?

owner_asks_client.label: Manual lymphatic drainage - yes or no?
owner_asks_client.body: BB ranks #1 at the AF pin for 'lymphatic drainage massage' (3,600 UT/mo search volume) with NO on-site page for it. Before we build the page (highest-ROI single page-build of the quarter), we need to confirm: does BB perform the manual lymphatic drainage modality, or is the rank a Maps-attribution artifact?

owner_asks_client.label: GA4 conversion config - what changed around May 1?
owner_asks_client.body: We caught duplicate conversion events firing under different names: session_booked + booking_confirmed are the same booking action; click_to_dial + click_phone_number are the same call; contact_form_submission + contact_form_submit are the same form. In May 2026 GA4 started attributing both halves of each pair as separate conversions, inflating May leads by ~50%. We've excluded May from the headline numbers in this report. Need: who set up the duplicate events, and can we de-duplicate going forward?

owner_asks_client.label: 16-KPI M3 close-out scorecard sign-off
owner_asks_client.body: We've drafted a 16-KPI scorecard for the M3 close-out (3 LD rank metrics, 2 GSC CTR metrics, 1 review-velocity metric, 1 CallRail quality metric, 4 page-build/cannibal metrics, etc.). The full list lives in the strategic dashboard. Want to confirm these are the right 16 - and lock the M3 targets - before we close Q2 against them.

_data_provenance.ga4: GA4 property 332738090 - 18-month channel x month pull 2026-05-22. May 2026 partial included (16 of 31 days) with a duplicate-event flag in the chart caption.
_data_provenance.gsc: Google Search Console - bbmassageandfloat.com - 365d trailing 2025-05-22 to 2026-05-21
_data_provenance.localdominator: 44 CSV scans across 12 keywords (9 main + 3 supplementary) x up to 5 dates. Client-report heatmap locks all keywords to the common Jan 19 -> Apr 18 window (massage therapy has no May 18 scan, so May 18 is excluded report-wide for apples-to-apples consistency). May 18 data remains in ld_grids.json for the strategic dashboard. 13x13 grid centered at the AF pin, 0.75-mile cell radius.
